subject: Ecology
title: Climate-Resilient Cities
description: A quick win: understand Climate-Resilient Cities.

hook.text: Climate change hits cities hardest—more heat, more floods, more extreme weather events.

buildup.text: Resilient cities prepare ecosystems to absorb shocks: wetlands for floods, trees for heat.

discovery.text: Rotterdam built water plazas that are parks in dry weather and reservoirs during storms.

twist.text: Ecological resilience and social equity overlap—vulnerable communities need green infrastructure most.

climax.text: Planning for resilience costs less than rebuilding after disaster, but requires long-term thinking.

punchline.text: Resilient cities invest in ecosystems, not just concrete.

quiz.question: How do water plazas in Rotterdam work?
options: Parks in dry weather, reservoirs during storms
They pump water to other cities
